request.prompt: Create one classroom-safe educational image about What Triggers a Reaction?. Subject: Science (086). Grade level: Class X / 10. Topic focus: Heat, Light, Electricity Conditions. Must show visually: Heat: Decomposition of Lead Nitrate. Visual goal: A labelled classroom diagram for What Triggers a Reaction? that makes the process or structure visible while the teacher explains visual_explainer.. Teaching context: Explain the external conditions required to initiate chemical reactions.. Student takeaway: Students will identify heat, light, and electricity as common triggers for reactions.. Show the scientific or educational concept itself, not a presentation slide about the concept. Do not draw a slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, classroom poster, infographic, worksheet, UI card, or presentation layout. Do not include any words, letters, labels, headings, captions, bullets, eq...
request.negativePrompt: text, labels, captions, numbers, watermark, decorative clutter, formula text, axis labels, diagram callouts, presentation slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, poster layout, infographic layout, ui card, worksheet, powerpoint slide, presentation template
